_doc: Max-level group instances per expansion — the 'endgame dungeons' tier of
heroic group content. Drives the Dungeons category on the rankings page.
Each key is the EXACT canonical zone name as it appears in eq2_zones.json.
Each value is the list of zones that count as endgame dungeons for that
expansion. The builder (scripts/build_zones_db.py) inserts a 'dungeon' row
into zone_types for each named zone — so a zone gets BOTH the existing
Curation rule of thumb: include zones that level-capped raid groups farmed
for top-tier heroic gear during that expansion's cycle. Quest-flagging
instances, levelling content, and contested-zone shards don't count.
Keys starting with '_' (like this one) are ignored by the loader so we can
keep documentation in the same file.
